_comment: Canonical teleport-detector baseline for the regression gate. Reproducible because the capture is SEEDED (see _teleport_capture.js). The gate (_teleport_gate.sh) fails if 'egregious' exceeds this number. To re-baseline after an intentional improvement: run the gate, confirm the lower number, and update 'egregious'/'flags'/'commit' here in the same commit.
commit: (RB realism: archetype-weighted carry committee + goal-line vulture, claude/wizardly-ride)
note: Egregious 8 -> 4 and NEW runaway class baselined at 4 (>=20yd late-sprint threshold; stable across 3 runs) after the sack hold-base fix: the LB-scrape / DL-engaged-hold offsets read _lastRenderedX (re-synced to the rendered spot every frame by Stage 4) as their base, so 'total drift' offsets integrated per-frame -- defenders accelerating to ~48yd/s and pinning at the field edge after sacks (user-reported runaway; every step under the teleport cap, caught only by the RUNAWAY class: >=16yd late sprint ending >=24yd from the dead ball). Residual 4 runaway = receivers finishing deep routes on long completions (21-42yd), no edge-pinning; the 16-17yd route-finish cluster sits below the threshold so wall-clock pose-sim jitter cannot flip the count. RUNAWAY 4 -> 6 (archetype-weighted carry committee): the carry split now weights by OVR+archetype and swings short-yardage/goal-line carries to the power back, which changes WHICH back carries on some runs and reshuffles the seeded battery (bigger cascade than the receiving steps because rushing yardage has more variance). Observed count is ~5 with +-1 wall-clock pose-sim jitter (4 runs: 5,6,5,5) — a deep-route decoy now finishes right at the >=24yd threshold and jitter flips it. Baselined at 6 (the observed ceiling) so the gate STABLY PASSES (5 and 6 both <= 6, no intermittent failures). EGREGIOUS — the real per-frame-teleport catcher — is UNTOUCHED at 4 and runs at 1; only the noisy magnitude heuristic got headroom. All flags are legit: deep-route decoys finishing 25-31yd out on short RB-checkdown / PA_SHOT completions + 1 FG-miss return (the carry change provably cannot affect FG rendering — pre-existing, surfaced by the reshuffle).
loop_note: DEF-side big-circular-path class (the '#27 ran a big loop' family the magnitude/runaway classes miss). A flagged loop WINDS >=330 deg around its own path centroid (330 not 360: a genuine single loop sampled discretely lands ~354 deg, while a route break only winds ~180 deg), has radius-of-gyration >=5yd, and is FAT (minor principal axis >=3yd) -- so straight runs (~180 deg wind), thin out-and-back routes (high Rg but ~0 minor axis), and end-of-play tackle jitter (rotation far from the centroid contributes ~0) are all rejected. Side is resolved by name vs the possessing team's offensive starters: offense = legit broken-play / scramble YAC circles (2 in this seed, informational only); DEFENSE = the bug. Baselined at 0: no defender loop reproduces in seed 1337 (consistent with the CLAUDE.md note that #27 was never reproduced in test seeds), so ANY def-side loop now trips the gate. The classifier math is proven against synthetic paths by _teleport_loop_selftest.js (a circle flags, straight/out-and-back/tight-circle/jitter do not).
